name: Draft, approve, send (write path)
_comment: SKELETON — importable starting point for the SINGLE-BOX / no-inbound model. Telegram is reached by POLLING: a Schedule trigger calls getUpdates (track the update offset in workflow static data — finish that in the editor), an Extract step shapes each update as { message: { chat: { id }, text } } for the guard, then the model DRAFTS only; the allowlist Code node + a human approval gate sit between draft and the Gmail send node, which alone holds the credential. Verify node versions and reconnect credentials in the editor.

nodes.name: Telegram getUpdates (poll)
nodes._comment: Pass ?offset=<last_update_id+1> from workflow static data to avoid reprocessing — wire in the editor.

values.content:
Draft a reply (do not send). Context:
={{ $json.message.text }}

nodes.name: Telegram approve gate
nodes._comment: Use a wait-for-reply / human-in-the-loop pattern; only 'ok' continues to send.
